title: NaturalDisasters
description: Advanced event system plugin for your server
body:
NaturalDisasters is an advanced and rich Spigot plugin that makes the gameplay much more entertaining.

This plugin brings you 7 crazy disasters that you can control and customize

- Tsunami
- Earthquakes
- Tornado
- Blizzard
- Drought
- Volcanic Eruption
- Meteor Shower

More disasters in next updates!


Access to NaturalDisasters GUI by the command _/naturaldisasters_
